name: Ben Purslow
notes: Overall project ownership. Manages scope, timeline, and stakeholder communication. Final decision-maker on launch readiness.

contactLog.summary: Sprint 1 planning kickoff with full team
Scope negotiation call with James and Lisa to define beta boundaries
Stakeholder update — reviewed progress and blockers with Sarah and Tom
Launch checklist review with core team

name: Alex Chen
notes: Leads frontend implementation. Focused on React dashboard and onboarding flow. Handling mobile responsive issues.

contactLog.summary: Sprint 1 planning — picked up dashboard and onboarding tickets
Design review of onboarding screens with James
Bug triage session — identified mobile layout regressions

name: Maria Santos
notes: Backend architecture and API development. Owns auth flow, database layer, and API documentation. Currently blocked on OAuth token refresh bug.

contactLog.summary: Architecture decision meeting — advocated for Postgres, team agreed
Bug triage — flagged auth edge cases from QA
Auth bug post-mortem — walked through token refresh failure root cause
Slack thread with Tom about database index performance concerns

name: James Wilson
notes: UI/UX design lead. Completed onboarding flow design and copy. Contributed competitor analysis for onboarding benchmarking.

contactLog.summary: Sprint 1 planning — committed to onboarding design deliverables
Design review — presented onboarding screens, received feedback
Scope negotiation — discussed which design elements are v1 vs v1.1

name: Sarah Kim
notes: Quality assurance and testing strategy. Created beta feedback form. Leading auth flow test coverage and cross-browser testing.

contactLog.summary: Bug triage session — prioritized 12 open bugs by severity
Beta feedback debrief — presented aggregated tester feedback
Auth bug post-mortem — shared QA test results showing 3 critical failures
Sent updated test coverage report to Ben ahead of stakeholder update

name: Tom Baker
notes: Infrastructure and deployment. Set up CI/CD pipeline. Handling SSL certificate configuration and error monitoring setup. Single point of failure risk identified.

contactLog.summary: Architecture decision — discussed infrastructure implications of Postgres choice
Infrastructure planning — mapped out CI/CD pipeline and environment strategy
Auth bug post-mortem — investigated deployment-related auth failures

name: Lisa Nguyen
notes: External beta tester. First user onboarded. Provided detailed feedback on onboarding flow and task management features.

contactLog.summary: Scope negotiation — shared beta user perspective on must-have features
Beta feedback debrief — presented detailed usage notes and pain points

name: Mike Johnson
notes: External beta tester. Focused on mobile experience. Reported several responsive layout issues.

contactLog.summary: Beta feedback debrief — highlighted mobile layout issues and loading times
Sent follow-up email with screenshots of mobile rendering bugs on Android
